notes.title: DOG online
notes.body: This twin now broadcasts a conformant rapp-twin-pulse/1.0 pulse: SHA-chained, Ed25519-signable bones over rapp-frame/2.0. Trust the hash, not the host.

notes.title: Snapshot sealed
notes.body: A portable, PII-free organism slice was sealed from the public bones. It hot-loads to AWAKEN in any local brainstem — public bones travel over raw, the private vault never leaves the device.
